howItWorks.title: How GradeByAI Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four dimensions. One definitive score. Complete clarity on your AI readiness.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Our crawler visits your live site just like an AI assistant would — following robots.txt, checking sitemaps, and testing JavaScript rendering.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We evaluate heading hierarchies, semantic HTML, schema.org markup, and whether your content is machine-readable.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Meta tags, canonical URLs, page speed signals, and structured data all feed into your technical score.
howItWorks.step4Desc: AI systems favour authoritative, well-structured content. We measure readability, depth, and topical coverage.
howItWorks.tier1Desc: Your site is highly visible to AI assistants.
howItWorks.tier2Desc: Key barriers are limiting your AI visibility.
howItWorks.faq1A: AI-readiness (AEO) measures how well AI systems like ChatGPT and Claude can find, read, and understand your content. Sites that score well are more likely to appear in AI-generated answers.
howItWorks.faq2A: We analyze 4 dimensions: crawlability (30pts), content structure (35pts), technical SEO (25pts), and content quality (10pts). Each is scored by crawling your live site.
howItWorks.faq3A: Common issues include missing structured data, JavaScript-only rendering, no sitemap, poor heading hierarchy, and thin content. Your results page shows exactly what to fix.
howItWorks.faq4A: We store your domain and score for caching (results are cached for 7 days). If you submit the lead form, we store your name, email, and phone. We never sell your data.
howItWorks.faq5Q: How often is my score updated?
howItWorks.faq5A: Scores are cached for 7 days. To force a fresh analysis, simply submit your URL again after the cache expires.
howItWorks.faq6A: Yes, fully free. The score and detailed breakdown are always free. We offer a premium consultation service for teams that need a full AEO action plan.
